search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to lastzwiki.com and focused on English guide pages. Prioritized direct hero and research hubs over generic homepages. No page was treated as proof for gameplay mechanics.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Core hero hub with character list, factions, levels, and equipment section; good lead for hero roster discovery and build references.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and equipment references for character research

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research hub with category tabs and level cost tables; useful for locating research categories and badge-cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and level cost tables

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English homepage linking to hero, research, alliance, and other guide sections; good starting index for navigation and cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Discover main guide sections and related wiki hubs

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Web search returned no matching pages on www.last-z.wiki for the requested query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results matched the query on the allowed source domain.

search_records.search_notes: Searched only the approved domain with the requested query. No matching pages were returned by the search provider.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results found for the approved domain and query within the allowed freshness window.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com only. Results emphasize one event page and supporting hero/event hub pages for cross-validation.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event with a research-focused cycle; one theme is Age of Science, which awards points for completing and speeding up technologies research.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Age of Science uses technology research and research speedups for scoring.
The event cycles through multiple daily themes.
Reward and ranking tables are tied to the day's total points.

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page that defines hero classes and power factors, useful for linking hero upgrade mechanics to event tasks.
results.primary_user_job: Map hero categories and the main power systems tied to hero growth.
claims_to_verify: Hero power is built from level, stars, skills, equipment, modified vehicle, structure, and technologies.
Heroes are commanders for offensive and defensive actions.
Hero class groups include S, A, and B types.

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events, helpful for locating where event systems are organized in the game UI.
results.primary_user_job: Locate the in-game event menu and understand event categories.
claims_to_verify: Regular events reset daily at Apocalypse Time 00:00:00.
Event Center contains separate tabs for event details, goals, and rewards.

search_records.search_notes: Search limited to www.packsify.com returned no matching results for the provided query. No discovery leads found within the allowed source domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed Packsify pages matched the Last Z gear guide query under the allowed domain filter.

search_records.search_notes: Focused on exact Last Z guide/wiki pages on the allowed domain. Results include building, research, combat, and event guides suitable for topic discovery and cross-validation.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for long-range troop training; covers unlocks, training cap, speed, and upgrade table.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and troop training

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for Assaulter troop training; focuses on cap, speed, power gain, and upgrade milestones.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research hub guide; covers tech unlocks, HQ dependency, and second lab access.
results.primary_user_job: Check research unlocks and lab progression
